title: All-atomic simulation of POPE bilayer with RFZ
author: Nesterenko Alexey
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We have performed simulations of POPE to check if the  reaction-field-zero  mode of calculating electrostatics is a good substitute for PME if we want to avoid PME for some reasons (e.g. for stress calculations). We started this simulation from the configuration deposited by Matti Javanainen (10.5281/zenodo.2641987). We performed the simulation of about 500 ns with the reaction-field-zero protocol supplemented as well. DMPC simulated with the same RFZ protocol is deposited in a separate dataset (10.5281/zenodo.8431709).
